# Web3 Pi

Web3 Pi documentation — running Ethereum nodes on Raspberry Pi, and the Web3 Pi UPS smart DC uninterruptible power supply.

## Web3 Pi

- [Home](https://docs.web3pi.io/index.md)
- [What is an Ethereum Node?](https://docs.web3pi.io/introduction/ethereum-node/index.md)
- [Next Steps](https://docs.web3pi.io/introduction/next-steps/index.md)
- [Can I earn with Web3 Pi?](https://docs.web3pi.io/introduction/staking/index.md)
- [About Web3 Pi](https://docs.web3pi.io/introduction/web3-pi-project/index.md)
- [Hardware Assembly](https://docs.web3pi.io/setup/dual-mode/hardware-assembly/index.md)
- [Required Hardware](https://docs.web3pi.io/setup/dual-mode/hardware-checklist/index.md)
- [Recommended Hardware](https://docs.web3pi.io/setup/dual-mode/hardware-recommendations/index.md)
- [Installation Monitoring](https://docs.web3pi.io/setup/dual-mode/installation-monitoring/index.md)
- [Software Setup](https://docs.web3pi.io/setup/dual-mode/software-setup/index.md)

- [Overclocking](https://docs.web3pi.io/advanced-setup/OC/index.md)

- [Power over Ethernet](https://docs.web3pi.io/advanced-setup/poe/index.md)
- [Firewall Configuration (UFW)](https://docs.web3pi.io/advanced-setup/ufw/index.md)
